overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit futuristic city. The player crosses intersections and walks along covered sidewalks beneath elevated highways, passing holographic advertisements, wet reflective streets, and futuristic architecture with vibrant pink and cyan lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit urban intersection with holographic advertisements and wet reflective streets

events.description: black van drives across the crosswalk from right to left
pedestrians cross the path from left to right in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: walking across the yellow striped crosswalk toward the center of the intersection, approaching the cylindrical neon tower

notable_agents.action: black van driving across the intersection from right to left
pedestrian walking across the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing covering the street
large cylindrical structure with glowing pink neon bands at its base
floating digital advertisements and brand logos suspended above the street
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated glass facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a wide urban intersection at night, dominated by neon lighting and wet reflective streets. The player walks across a prominent yellow striped crosswalk while a black van passes by, approaching a large cylindrical tower with glowing pink neon lights at its center.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: turns left from open intersection onto covered sidewalk beneath the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk under the overpass, passing neon-lit storefronts and an escalator structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: elevated highway or monorail structure creating a roof over the sidewalk
yellow and purple neon-lit escalator entrance on the left side
black metal posts lining the edge of the sidewalk separating it from the street

segments.scene_description: The player turns left onto a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure. The cylindrical neon tower now sits to the left as the player walks past neon-lit storefronts and an escalator entrance, with the sky mostly blocked by the overhead infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway transitioning to open intersection with increased pedestrian traffic

events.description: pedestrian density increases as approaching the next intersection
exiting the covered walkway into a more open plaza area near the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: continuing along the walkway, approaching a group of pedestrians congregating near the next intersection crossing

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking and gathering near the upcoming crosswalk

entered.detail: large circular neon sign with 'SALLY'S' text visible on the building ahead
traffic light pole with walk signal near the intersection
scattered garbage and debris along the left edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the covered walkway, the player approaches the end of the sheltered area where pedestrian traffic increases. The large circular 'SALLY'S' neon sign becomes visible in the distance as the environment transitions from the covered walkway toward an open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with prominent circular neon signage and police presence

events.description: black car drives past on the right side of the frame
navigates around police officers standing on the left sidewalk while crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection toward the building with the large circular neon sign, navigating around other pedestrians and police officers

notable_agents.action: black car driving through the intersection from right to left
police officers standing near the crosswalk observing the street

entered.detail: yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the street
front entrance of the building with the circular neon signage
massive digital billboard displaying animated content above the street

segments.scene_description: The player exits the covered area and crosses another open intersection, navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic. A black car passes by on the right while police officers stand on the left sidewalk. The player approaches the building with the prominent 'SALLY'S' circular neon sign, which dominates the left side of the frame as the crossing continues.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a wide, neon-lit urban intersection into a sheltered transit corridor and back out into the open city night. It begins by crossing a yellow striped crosswalk on a wet, reflective street, moving past a black van toward a towering cylindrical structure glowing with pink neon. As the camera turns left, the environment shifts from the open road to a covered sidewalk beneath a heavy elevated highway, passing neon storefronts and an escalator entrance under the shadow of the overhead infrastructure. The scene then opens up as the player reaches the end of the sheltered walkway, where the view expands toward a distant, circular neon sign for Sally's. Finally, the camera exits the covered area to cross another busy intersection, navigating past police officers and a passing black car before arriving directly beneath the dominant glow of the Sally's sign.
